text.title: Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM) Generation and Maintenance Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the requirements-traceability methodology end-to-end.

step.name: seed-edges
step.action: Add edges per role; persist as YAML.

step.name: maintain-on-change
step.action: RTM update step gated in change-control.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
